heroHeadline: BREAKING — Italy's Meloni in Doha for Energy Talks; Trump Issues 48-Hour Ultimatum to Iran
heroSubtitle: Italian PM Meloni met Qatar's Emir on Apr 4 to secure LNG alternatives amid Iran war disruption risks. Trump simultaneously issued a 48-hour ultimatum to Iran. Iranian state TV broadcast a reward for a missing US airman as the April 6 Hormuz deadline approaches.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-04. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post.
